title: ferray-strings: no indexing/slicing on StringArray
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

StringArray has no indexing or slicing methods. You can access the flat data via as_slice() but can't index into a 2D StringArray by row or column, and can't slice along an axis. NumPy's chararray subclasses ndarray and inherits all indexing. Add at least: index(flat_idx), get_row(idx), slice_axis(axis, range) methods.
